selected_frontier_observable_target.name: finite_radial_signal_travel_time_bound
selected_frontier_observable_target.narrow_analogy: same bounded shape as V/I: fixed finite inputs -> computed scalar -> tolerance check

existing_pattern_source.pattern: finite observations only; compute scalar; compare against declared bound; state non-claims

frontier_mapping.formal_input_surface: finite radial signal observation input surface

what_this_does: records one narrow frontier-observable-style input bridge
checks that declared time-of-flight observations match radius divided by signal speed within a fixed tolerance
copies the bounded-observable pattern, not the physical authority, of the Ohm's Law fixed-observation demo
what_this_does_not_claim: does not claim quantum gravity closure
does not claim empirical prediction discharge
does not claim a completed physics theory
does not claim that compilation proves physical truth
